title: 9 Herbal Teas For Bladder Infection
description: Glycyrrhiza glabra teas contains anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that may help alleviate symptoms of bladder infections. The main constituents, glycyrrhizin and flavonoids, have been shown to inhibit the growth of harmful bacteria, such as E. coli, that cause bladder infections. Glycyrrhizin also has a soothing effect on the urinary tract, reducing inflammation and discomfort. When taking Glycyrrhiza glabra teas for bladder infection, it's recommended to drink 2-3 cups a...
